note: EO 'tepoz' → tepoz- (not tepotz-) in compound; corrected to tepozapazoicoltontli
pitzotl and atlaatecuitl are two separate words; they should not be merged into one compound.
TE_ACTUAL drops the initial a- of atonahuiztli; the compound must preserve it: cemilhui + atonahuiztli = cemilhuiatonahuiztli.
ieie = yeyeca; reuniting tetlayeyeca + calhuiliztli gives tetlayeyecacalhuiliztli (TE_ACTUAL omitted the -ca- segment).
«netoch» conserva la h final: netochcayotiliztli, no netoccayotiliztli
iequal+cáiotl form a single compound; joined as yecualcayotl following standard compounding pattern.
STUB impone 'chualiztli', no 'cualiztli'; TE_ACTUAL usaba la forma incorrecta 'cualiztli'.
oquixtli normalizado a oquichtli (variante escribal x→ch en esta raíz).
EO has single 'l' in 'xilan'; no basis for doubling to 'xillan'.
nino- → mo- (reflexive citation form), matching pattern from parallel examples like ninotemachía→motemachia.
quauhtlâ cochtli forms a single compound noun 'cuauhtlacochtli' (projecting wooden beam)

old_te: tliltic comaqui ani in ipapan miqui
new_te: tliltic comaqui ani in ipapan miqui

note: EO 'ostiate' is a Nahuatl loanword form (not 'Ostiario'); the two nouns form a compound as in similar entries.
El stub es 'cuelpachoa' (sin tla-); se elimina el prefijo tla- de tlacuelpachoa para respetar el stub inamovible.
yangel expandido como 'in angel' (cf. yqualli → in cualli); acento eliminado; stub dioz respetado.
Reflexive prefix mo- restored (nino- → mo- after stripping ni-); cf. pattern in correction examples.
oquich and ichcanacatl appear to function as a two-word phrase (modifier + noun) rather than a single compound; kept separate following the EO spacing.
Removed spurious extra 'c'; correct compound is tlotli+icxicpiloni = tlotliicxicpiloni.
i intervocálica entre vocales en la unión neihi+iotiloni → y: neihiyotiloni
dios+ihuic+tlaitolli forman un compuesto nominal; se fusionan en una sola palabra.
STUB es 'itlanilia'; se respeta el stub eliminando los prefijos mo-tla- que TE_ACTUAL añadió.
nini- = ni(sujeto) + ni(reflexivo→mo-); se elimina el prefijo de sujeto y se restaura mo- ante la raíz.
restored missing 'cu': tetepoz+macuahuiani
ni- dropped but reflexive mo- retained from ninomáti → momati; in separated from tlatlacolli
STUB es minaloni (no minoloni); tlatepoz+minaloni compuesto sin espacio.
Spanish loanword + Nahuatl noun form a compound, written without space, following the pattern quesopatzcaloni, cahuayomachti, etc.
EO 'tecoco' normaliza a 'tecoco' (solo eliminación de acento); TE_ACTUAL 'tececoc' introduce reduplicación y -c final no justificadas.
totolocmecatla needs final -n restored; the two words remain separate rather than compounded
EO tiene 'opa' con una sola p; TE_ACTUAL añade 'pp' sin justificación en el original.
teoan→tehuan (intervocalic o=/w/→hu); ni- dropped but tla- object prefix restored: tlanenehuilia
El STUB es 'notzalo' (sin mo-); se respeta literalmente.
STUB es 'onoc' (^ indica eliminación del prefijo n-); 'nonoc' → 'onoc'
tepoz compounds without -tz coda before vowel-initial stem, as in tepozcozcatl; corrected to tepozotlapallihuaztli
El stub 'papaqui' excluye el prefijo de objeto 'te-'; se elimina para concordar con el stub.
STUB is 'papatzoa' (tla- dropped in citation); TE_ACTUAL incorrectly retains tla-.
ni- (1sg subj) dropped; reflexive no- → mo-; ç→z already correct
teteu → teteoh (coda hu+t → uht) before toca; teteotoca → teteohtoca
STUB tequipachoa (^) removes both ni- and te- prefixes; TE_ACTUAL incorrectly retained te-.
tlani is a separate locative adverb ('below/at the bottom'), not a prefix to be fused with the stub; keep as two words.
çanen → zannen (double n restored as in other zannen entries); two words kept separate as in parallel examples.
cecca → cenca (standard normalization of the adverb).
quin- (3pl object prefix) retained; only ni- (1sg subject) dropped per citation rule.
iolla → yohualla (yohualli adverbial form); kept separate from stub yohualnepantla
ni- dropped but reflexive no- retained as mo- per ^ convention; accent removed from â.
iztlaca + apipiiolli forman compuesto nominal, como iztac+teocuitlatl → iztacteocuitlatl.
o intervocálica /w/ en 'teoan' → 'tehuan'.
ni- dropped, reflexive no- restored as mo-; teoan→tehuan
ninocáua → mocahua (reflexive mo-, not possessive no-)
teuan→tehuan (v→hu); ninocáua→mocahua (ni- dropped, no-→mo- per ^ marker)
castilla → castillan following the locative-n pattern seen in parallel entries (chapopohtli castillan, etc.)
teach+cauh forma un compuesto nominal sin espacio, como otros términos de parentesco del vocabulario.
Las dos palabras del EO forman un compuesto; se unen siguiendo el patrón de ejemplos como zoquitlachihualli.
Compound noun: modifier zanachitonatiuh joins directly with cayotl, as per standard compounding patterns.
totolcone → totolconetl: absolutive suffix -tl restored on the final element of the compound noun.
intlanex separado en 'in tlanex': partícula 'in' + sustantivo 'tlanex'.
Los dos elementos forman un compuesto nominal; se unen sin espacio.
quaquaque → cuacuahueh (qua→cua, -que→-hueh as in cuacuahueh 'cattle/cows')
«citlalpil to» es la forma partida de citlalpilton (diminutivo -ton); se une en una sola palabra.
neiollo + cocoltiliztli forman un compuesto nominal; además i intervocálica → y en neiollo.
intervocalic i→y and locative -n added to icemania → icemanyan
maça+quaquahutentzónecónatl form a single compound; no space between maza and cuacuauhtentzoneconatl.
occencatepito split into oc cenca tepito (three adverbial elements)
tepoz and cuauhchayahuac compounded as a single modifier, per standard compound pattern.
naui→nahui: h belongs within the stem (nahui 'four'), giving tlanauhilil, not tlanahuilil.
Compound noun written as single word following the pattern of similar entries.
Three elements form a single compound locative; joined following the pattern of similar compound entries.
teteuc word-final → teteuh (coda rule: final -uc → -uh)
tla- object prefix retained after dropping ni-; tlahuahualtza (tla+hua+hualtza from nitlaoaoaltza)
ahuecatla → ahuecatlan (locative -n restored, cf. 'amo huecatlan' example)
STUB fixes the headword as 'huitequi' (without te-); TE_ACTUAL incorrectly retained the te- object prefix.
toca + icuiloliztli form a single compound noun (tocaicuiloliztli, 'name-writing/signing'); written as one word.
Los dos elementos forman un compuesto nominal; se unen sin espacio.
Loanword 'tozino' normalized to standard Spanish 'tocino'.
noyoma → moyoma por analogía con el ejemplo paralelo 'ytech ninoyoma çihuatl' → 'ytech moyoma cihuatl'
tlaachtopa + itoani written as compound, following the pattern of similar modifier+noun forms.
El stub es 'mahuizoa' sin prefijo tla-; la TE_ACTUAL añade 'tla-' en contra del stub inamovible.
ninomáti → ni- dropped, no- → mo-: momati (reflexive prefix preserved as mo-)
tla- object prefix must be retained; only ni- (subject 1sg) is dropped in citation.
ie- → ye- (i intervocálica/semivocálica inicial → y); acento eliminado en métztli ya cubierto por stub.
iancuic → yancuic: i inicial ante vocal a → y (semivocal /y/).
Compound noun written as one word, following the pattern of similar entries.
teiztepoz + minaloni forman un compuesto nominal; se unen en una sola palabra siguiendo el patrón de los compuestos del vocabulario.
teuan → tehuan (u semivocálica /w/ → hu)
teoan → tehuan (intervocalic o=/w/→hu); ni- dropped per citation rule, ^ signals reflexive mo- restored → monemi
Las tres palabras forman un compuesto nominal agentivo; se unen sin espacios.
Compuesto unido, siguiendo el patrón del ejemplo 'tetlacuitlahuilticanonotzaliztli'.
tetlacuitlauiltica → tetlacuitlahuiltica (v→hu, no extra i); compounded with nonotzaloni per parallel example.
xicucuitla = xicocuitla (u→o vowel alternation in xicotl-cuitlatl compound); the two words form a single compound noun written without space.
tlaq^ltica: quil→cual (tlaqualli→tlacualli pattern), giving tlacualtica.
reflexive mo- retained from nino- (ni- dropped, no- → mo-); cf. tehuan mocahua, ytech moyoma
teca + teaxcatiliztli forman un compuesto nominal; se unen en una sola palabra siguiendo el patrón de otros compuestos con prefijo relacional.
tlatoca- prefijo nominal se funde con el sustantivo, como en tlatocateoyoicuiloani; forma un compuesto.
tetl + tepoztentiloni compuesto en una sola palabra, siguiendo el patrón de otros compuestos nominales.
Compound noun written as one word, following the pattern of modifier+headword compounds (cf. tlahuellatlahuelihuini).
i intervocálica entre xochi- y -otl → xochiyotl (forma clásica normalizada).
'tlaoppa' normaliza a 'tlaocpa' (tla-oc-pa, 'otra vez'), con -pp- → -p-.
çanen → zannen (doble n estándar del adverbio, cf. ejemplos zannen)
Object prefix te- must be retained: nitetlaçótla → tetlazotla, not tlazotla.
q^h expands to 'quih', giving quilhnamiqui (not quilnamiqui); stub tolina retained.
